scripts.start:whatsapp: bash -lc 'pids=""; cleanup(){ trap - INT TERM EXIT; for pid in $pids; do kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; done; wait 2>/dev/null || true; }; trap cleanup INT TERM EXIT; (cloudflared tunnel --config ~/.cloudflared/config.yml run 2>&1 | sed -u "s/^/[cloudflared] /") & pids="$pids $!"; (npm start 2>&1 | sed -u "s/^/[pepita] /") & pids="$pids $!"; wait'
